title: Get urgent, express or emergency weekend passport services - Canada.ca
content:
## Get urgent, express or emergency weekend passport services

## Passport and travel document service fees have increased
As of March 31, 2026 , most fees for passports and travel document services have increased. Learn how these changes may affect your application .
If you need your passport faster, you may be able to get one of these services:
- urgent pick-up (by the end of next business day)
- express pick-up (2 to 9 business days) Some locations take at least 3 or 4 business days to process express applications.
- Some locations take at least 3 or 4 business days to process express applications.
- emergency weekend or statutory holiday service
You can request these services
- when you apply in person
- after you apply, but you now need your passport sooner
To get the services, you
- need to provide the necessary documents
- may have to pay additional fees
Express service usually means you’ll get your passport in 2 to 9 business days.
However, the following locations take slightly longer:
- Kelowna, British Columbia 4 to 9 business days
- 4 to 9 business days
- Pointe-Claire, Quebec 4 to 9 business days
- 4 to 9 business days
- Charlottetown, Prince Edward Island 3 to 9 business days
- 3 to 9 business days
Proof  you need the passport can be
- an airline, bus or train ticket If travelling by car, a written statement explaining why you need to travel
- If travelling by car, a written statement explaining why you need to travel
- a travel itinerary showing proof of payment
- proof of illness or death in the family requiring you to travel
- a written statement from you or a third party explaining why you need the passport For example, for legal, banking or residency requirements
- For example, for legal, banking or residency requirements
If we can’t deliver the passport in time to you or your child, we aren’t liable for any losses.
We recommend that you don’t finalize any travel plans until you get your passport.

## Instructions to get urgent or emergency services
Answer the following questions to learn about your next steps.

## I urgently need to renew an adult passport in Canada
On the following page, tell us when you need the passport.
We’ll then explain how to renew your passport urgently, including which locations offer express, urgent or emergency service.
How to renew your passport in Canada

### We can’t guarantee that you’ll get your passport on time.
For example, you may not get a passport within your timeline if
- there are security concerns with your application or
- your application is incomplete

## I urgently need a new adult passport in Canada
On the following page, tell us when you need the passport.
We’ll then explain how to apply for an adult passport urgently, including which locations offer express, urgent or emergency service.
How to apply for an adult passport in Canada

### We can’t guarantee that you’ll get your passport on time.
For example, you may not get a passport within your timeline if
- there are security concerns with your application or
- your application is incomplete

## I urgently need a child passport in Canada
On the following page, tell us when you need the passport.
We’ll then explain how to apply for a child passport urgently, including which locations offer express, urgent or emergency service.
How to apply for a child passport in Canada

### We can’t guarantee that you’ll get your passport on time.
For example, you may not get a passport within your timeline if
- there are security concerns with your application or
- your application is incomplete

## I’m outside Canada and need a passport urgently
Contact the nearest Government of Canada office abroad. They’ll decide if you qualify for urgent services.
If you need urgent help while abroad, request emergency assistance (opens in a new tab) .
Find the closest Government of Canada office

### We can’t guarantee that you’ll get your passport on time.
For example, you may not get a passport within your timeline if
- there are security concerns with your application or
- your application is incomplete
If you already applied for a passport and now need it within the next 9 business days or less, call us.
We’ll help you find a way to get your passport urgently. Extra fees may apply.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
